occupation_definition: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul automotive vehicles. Excludes “Automotive Body and Related Repairers” (49-3021), “Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists” (49-3031), and “Electronic Equipment Installers and Repairers, Motor Vehicles” (49-2096).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Vehicle and Mobile Equipment Mechanics, Installers, and Repairers
